workContext.summary: Brian Mauck is Head of Capital Markets at Jeeves Financial Technology, running capital markets and credit data science. Work spans lender negotiations, analytics, ML, and structured credit. Key tools: Taktile, Redshift, Metabase, python-pptx, loc_tape, Linear, DeerFlow, LangGraph.

personalContext.summary: Direct, zero tolerance for hallucination or speculation without data. Always retrieve data — never reason about it. No workarounds; fix root causes. Expects browser automation attempted before declaring impossible. Prefers Fable 5 for coding and reasoning tasks.

1) Vista diligence: PwC/Vista shared QoE workstream active
2) NB: 3 agreed steps post Jun 8 call; close end of June
3) GTV/Liquidity tension: potential end-of-month cash deficit
4) BBVA SOFOM wind-down: internal sync Thu Jun 11
5) Cap Markets dashboard: CICO→bank_accts wiring complete; daca_pledged_usd extraction still broken

recentMonths.summary: In June 2026, Brian built a Capital Markets intelligence surface: morning Slack brief plus localhost:8100 credit health dashboard covering BB snapshot, DQ 30+ trends, roll rate heatmap, NCO trend, and covenant tracker. Dashboard refactored to no-scroll 4-row layout. US BB pipeline extended with CICO email image extraction. Brian runs a local DeerFlow agent with Redshift, Slack, and Google integrations; memory portability via git-tracked memory.json and manual rsync of mem0_data SQLite. Agent repo has local uncommitted changes (capital-markets dashboard JSON, zscaler_reauth.py, start.sh, .gitignore) pending push for multi-laptop sync.
